name: vcmusic-pwa
description: Aggregator Musik Viral PWA & Android App

scripts.build: if not exist dist mkdir dist && xcopy /E /I /Y assets dist\assets && copy /Y *.html dist\ && copy /Y app.js dist\ && copy /Y style.css dist\ && copy /Y manifest.json dist\ && copy /Y sw.js dist\ && copy /Y robots.txt dist\ && copy /Y sitemap.xml dist\ && copy /Y app-ads.txt dist\ && copy /Y ads.txt dist\ && if exist vcmusic.apk copy /Y vcmusic.apk dist\
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap-init: npx cap init VCMusic com.vcsound.app --web-dir dist

author: VCMusic Team
